description: BTR Freight Inc. — driver recruiting card

backFields.label: Apply online
backFields.attributedValue: Open the DOT driver application — about 15 minutes, signed online, no printing.

backFields.label: Why drive with BTR
backFields.value:
•  Competitive, on-time pay — with detention, layover and stop pay
•  Consistent miles from a steady freight base
•  Real home time — regional and dedicated lanes
•  Late-model, well-maintained equipment
•  24/7 dispatch from people who know your name

backFields.label: What you'll need to qualify
backFields.value:
•  Valid Class A CDL in good standing
•  3 years verifiable DOT-regulated tractor-trailer experience
•  Complete, verifiable 10-year employment history
•  Acceptable MVR with no serious or recent disqualifying violations
•  At least 23 years of age and eligible to work in the U.S.
•  Able to pass a DOT physical and drug screen

backFields.label: The hiring process
backFields.value:
1.  Apply online — about 15 minutes
2.  A recruiter calls, usually within one to two business days
3.  Employment verification and DOT screening (MVR, PSP, drug test)
4.  Orientation, onboarding, and you're on the road

backFields.label: BTR Freight Inc.
backFields.value:
4728 Oakton St, Unit 208
Skokie, IL 60076

Equal Opportunity Employer — safety-first since day one.
